title: outputs
description: Results computed for one operating point of a time-base part. Time bases are SELECTED rather than simulated, so the output surface is a single selection block (the AAS pattern, reduced): how the bound part met the design-requirements seed. Each block carries the PEAS outputBase {origin, methodUsed} provenance shell. outputs[i] aligns positionally with inputs.operatingPoints[i].

selection.description: How the bound part met the design-requirements seed.

frequencyErrorWorstCase.description: Worst-case fractional frequency error at this operating point (tolerance + stability + aging over the stated lifetime), dimensionless.

supplyVoltageMargin.description: Fractional headroom of the part's supply range around the required supply.
